calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
David J. Briggs, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Bethel Housing Corp.
Dameka Barrow, defendant in pro per

Parties settled on the record. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendant Dameka Barrow to vacate premises located at 830 Laguna St., #K, San Francisco, CA. by Feb. 28, 2005. If defendant complies with the terms of the settlement, all back rents are waived, and dismissal will be filed. If defendant does not comply with the terms of the settlement, plaintiff to come in ex parte for judgment to be entered including rents owed and immediate restitution of said premises.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerks: V. Mu/D. Hakewill Reporter: P. Van Steenberge, #1742 (206)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on regularly for unlawful detainer settlement conference in Dept. 218, before Commissioner Sue Kaplan. Clerk: Vicki Mack JPT: C. Zadik Shapiro.

Plaintiff's counsel, David Briggs, Esq., appears with plaintiff's representative, Paula Butler.

No appearance by defendant in pro per, Dameka Barrow.

1:50PM The settlement conference is ordered off calendar. The jury demand is stricken. The court trial date remains DEC-27-2004 at 9:00AM in Dept. 206.
